articles.title: Why England won't fear Mexico or the Azteca - Shearer
articles.summary: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel's team will not be worried about the difficult conditions when they play Mexico at the Azteca Stadium.

articles.title: Bloomberg This Weekend 07/04/2026
articles.summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Rutgers University Professor Emeritus of American Studies Robert Synder, Retired Navy Vice Admiral

articles.title: "Nous nous vengerons" : une foule d'Iraniens afflue dans le centre de Téhéran pour un dernier adieu à Ali Khamenei tué par des frappes américaines et israéliennes
articles.summary: Selon les médias officiels, plusieurs millions de personnes ont participé à ce premier jour de funérailles nationales afin de montrer au monde "l'unité du pays".

articles.title: England beaten by South Africa in Nations Championship
articles.summary: South Africa asserted their dominance over England with a commanding victory in the Nations Championship at Ellis Park.

articles.title: Trump Takes Stock of Other Presidencies, Shedding Light on His Own
articles.summary: In his second term, the president has increasingly mused about his predecessors, comparing himself with some and distancing from the failures of others.

articles.title: WATCH:  Gold Star moms pay tribute to sons
articles.summary: The five mothers lost their sons who were in active duty formed a sisterhood to ensure all soldiers are never forgotten.

articles.title: Vingegaard denies Pogacar to win opening Tour stage
articles.summary: Denmark's Jonas Vingegaard took the yellow jersey on the opening stage of the Tour de France following a tense team time trial.

articles.title: Bethell stars as he guides England to impressive win against India
articles.summary: Jacob Bethell hits an unbeaten 76 as England recover from 1-2 to chase down 191 to beat India by four wickets in the second T20 at Old Trafford and take a 1-0 lead in the five match series.

articles.title: الجيش الإسرائيلي يشن غارات على قطاع غزة، ومفاوضات بين حماس وممثلين عن مجلس السلام
articles.summary: على مدار اليومين الماضيين، شهدت أنحاء متفرقة في قطاع غزة قصفاً إسرائيلياً، ما تسبب في مقتل 16 شخصاً وإصابة 16 آخرين. ويتزامن هذا مع مباحثات في القاهرة وقبرص لأعضاء من مجلس السلام الذي أسسه ترامب، بالإضافة إلى أعضاء في فصائل فلسطينية وممثلين عن حركة حماس ووسطاء.

articles.title: US Flyover Showcases Next-Generation Airpower
articles.summary: Retired US Army Colonel Wayne Sanders joins Bloomberg This Weekend during the 4th of July Naval Review and tall ships parade, 'Sail4th 250' taking place in the Hudson River. Col. Sanders explains to David Gura and Christina Ruffini how this show on the Hudson underscores US military capabilities in

articles.title: Jonas Vingegaard premier maillot jaune du Tour de France 2026, après la victoire de Team Visma | Lease a Bike sur le contre-la-montre par équipes à Barcelone
articles.summary: Le Danois a remporté la 1ere étape samedi, à Barcelone, et retrouve le maillot jaune pour la première fois depuis le Tour de France 2023.

articles.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
articles.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.
